questions: How do I stay safe online?
online e ki ki danger ache?
answers: Stay safe online by using strong unique passwords, enabling two-factor authentication, being careful with personal info, and not clicking suspicious links.
Online safe thakte strong password use koro, 2FA enable koro, personal info share koro na, ar suspicious link e click koro na.
Common online threats include phishing emails, malware, identity theft, scams, cyberbullying, and data breaches. Being aware is the first line of defense.
Keep your software updated, use a VPN on public Wi-Fi, review privacy settings on social media, and teach kids about online safety from an early age.
